theme: The 2026 Q3 corporate window is closing — what's left

linkedin.text:
You have 3 weeks to decide on a Q3 corporate trip. After that, you're planning Q4.

The usable Q3 window for senior B2B groups is just 8 weeks — late June to late August. Then you hit September holidays, Q4 budget freezes, hotel rates up 15-25%, and tightening air capacity.

What we still have this week:
🇪🇸 Spain — 2 flagship slots (Mallorca + Seville)
🇮🇹 Italy — Tuscany 1 mid-July week, Sicily open through August
🇬🇷 Greece — Crete + Rhodes open
🇵🇹 Portugal — Lisbon + Comporta fully open
🇭🇷 Croatia — Split + Dubrovnik mainland still open
🇨🇾 Cyprus — full availability, undervalued for 40-80

Already gone: mid-July weeks, Marbella luxury, Santorini at workable rates, Croatia in August.

If "we should do a corporate trip" has been a conversation for 6 months — this is the deadline. Give us one budget conversation and a 2-3 destination shortlist, and we'll send a proposal in 5 business days. No pitch deck meeting.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call this week and we'll lock your Q3 window.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
Every May we have the same conversation with companies who waited one week too long. ⏰

The Q3 corporate window is only 8 weeks — and it's already filling. After August it's holidays, budget freezes, and rates climbing 15-25%.

Still open right now: 🇪🇸 Mallorca, Seville · 🇮🇹 Tuscany, Sicily · 🇬🇷 Crete, Rhodes · 🇵🇹 Lisbon, Comporta · 🇭🇷 Split, Dubrovnik · 🇨🇾 Cyprus.

Give us one budget conversation and we'll have a proposal back in 5 business days — no pitch deck meeting.

If a team trip has been on your wishlist for months, this is the moment. Send us a message and we'll find your window. 💬
